Subject: // MV SOMNATH ( 55,707 MT ) OPENING KRISHNAPATNAM,ECI - 7TH - 10TH
DEC 2025 //
 
GOOD DAY, 

PLEASE PROPOSE SUITABLE RATED ORDERS FOR OUR OWNED TONNAGE , CAN CONSIDER
SINGLE TCT/ VOY OR PERIOD

MV SOMNATH ( 55,707 MT ) OPENING KRISHNAPATNAM,ECI  - 7TH - 10TH DEC 2025.

MV SOMNATH
BUILT: 2005 OSHIMA, JAPAN.
FLAG: INDIAN
CLASS: IRS
TYPE: SDBC
S/DWT: 55,707 MT ON DRAFT OF 12.502 MTRS.
TPC: 56
LOA: 189.99 M BEAM: 32.26 M
CUBIC CAPACITY: 69,872 CBM GRAIN //68,798 CBM BALE
INTERNATIONAL GRT / NRT: 30,704 / 18,492
CONSTANTS: 550MT EXCL FW & UNPUMPABLE.
UNPUMPABLE BALLAST 500MT.
NUMBER OF HOLDS / HATCHES: 5/5
GEAR: CRANES 4 X 30 MT.
GRABS 4 NOS x 12CBM RADIO REMOTE CONTROLED.
SWL OF CRANE UNDER GRAB OPERATION IS SUBJECT TO TARE WEIGHT OF EMPTY GRAB &
CARGO DENSITY.
GRAB SIZE REDUCED & USABLE TO 10,8 & 6 CBM.
GRABS SUITABLE FOR CARGO BULK DENSITY 0.8 TO 2.5 MT/CBM AND SWL OF CRANE
UNDER GRAB OPERATION
MAX 24MT INCL GRAB TEAR WEIGHT. 
TARE WEIGHT OF EACH EMPTY GRAB 9MT, EACH VESSEL'S GRABS TO BE DE-RATED IN
KEEPING WITH
ACCEPTABLE DENSITY /STOWAGE FACTOR OF
CARGO AND S.W.L. OF CRANES UNDER GRAB OPERATION.
VESSEL IS NOT SCRUBBER FITTED.
 
SPEED/CONSUMPTION
 
AT SEA 
LADEN ABOUT 11.00KN on 21MT/DAY LSFO +0.2MT LSMGO
BALLAST ABOUT 11.50KN on 21MT/DAY LSFO + 0.2MT LSMGO
IN PORT 
WORKING ABOUT 5MT IFO + 0.5MT/DAY LSMGO 
IDLE ABOUT 3.60MT IFO + 0.5MT LSMGO
 
 
ALL DETAILS ABOVE WOG.
 
AS PER OWNS COMPANY POLICY, CHARTERERS TO KEEP/MAINTAIN MINIMUM FIVE DAYS
SAILING BUNKERS AS RESERVES ON BOARD AT ALL TIME. 
 
BUNKER SPECS ISO 8217 2005 or 2010 LSFO 380 RMG CST / LSMGO DMA.
 
BUNKERS TO BE SUPPLIED ALWAYS IN CONFORMITY WITH REGULATIONS 14 AND 18 OF
ANNEX VI OF MARPOL 73/78
 
SULPHUR CONTAIN MAX 0.5% AS PER CURRENT MARPOL POLICY FOR EACH SUPPLY TO
APPLY.
 
BIMCO BUNKER FUEL SULPHUR CONTENT LATEST CLAUSE FOR TIME TO APPLY.
ADDITIONAL ABOUT 6 MTS IFO FOR EACH BALLAST EXCHANGE OPERATION AT SEA.
 
SPEED CONS DESCRIBED BASIS NO ADVERSE CURRENT/CALM SEAS & UNEXCEEDING 
BEAUFORT SCALE 4 AND DOUGLAS STATE 3 WAVE/SWEL (UPTO 1.25 MTRS)
 
SPEED/CONS DESCRIBED FROM SEABUOY TO SEABUOY. 
 
CALCULATION OF VESSEL'S PERFORMANCE ON BOTH LADEN AND BALLAST PASSAGES HAS
TO BE BASED UPON AN AVERAGE SPEED/CONSUMPTION DURING WEATHER DAYS UPTO
BEAUFORT SCALE 4 AND DOUGLAS STATE 3 (UPTO 1.25 MTRS). LADEN OR BALLAST
SPEED AND CONUMPTION FOR PERIOD OF WEATHER IN EXCESS OF BEAUFORT SCALE 4 &
DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3 (UPTO 1.25 MTRS) BE EXPRESSLY EXCLUDED FROM
CALCULATIONS.
BOTH 0.5 KNOTS SPEED AND 5% CONSUMPTION FOR THE TERM "ABOUT".
 
VESSEL TO HAVE OPTION OF CONSUMING  LSMGO WHILE MANOUVERING IN CANALS /
HARBORS / ENCLOSED SPACES /
DURING PILOTAGE AND FOR STARTING / STOPPING OF GENERATORS AND FOR USE OF
ADDITIONAL GENERATORS 
AS AND WHEN NEEDED FOR OPERATIONAL REQUIRMENTS.
 
ALL DETAILS ABOVE ABOUT .
 
 
Thanks & Regards,

Soubhagya Mishra | Deputy Manager | SEROS SHIPPING PRIVATE LIMITED | Mumbai
